raw_title: Survival in the Passion Economy: Mental Health and Well-Being of Local Journalism Entrepreneurs
title_en: Survival in the Passion Economy: Mental Health and Well-Being of Local Journalism Entrepreneurs
title_zh: 激情经济中的生存：地方新闻创业者的心理健康与福祉
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在激情经济背景下，地方新闻创业者如何维持心理健康和福祉。激情经济指的是人们基于个人兴趣和热情开展工作的经济模式。研究关注这些创业者面临的挑战，以及他们如何应对压力，保持身心健康。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how local journalism entrepreneurs maintain mental health and well-being in the passion economy. The passion economy refers to an economic model where people work based on personal interests and passions. The research focuses on the challenges these entrepreneurs face and how they cope with stress to stay healthy.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注数字时代新闻创业者的心理健康问题，探讨激情经济对媒体行业可持续发展的影响。
research_direction_en: The research examines mental health issues among journalism entrepreneurs in the digital age, exploring how the passion economy affects the sustainability of the media industry.
